svg.title: On-premise contact center stack vs CCaaS
svg.desc: Side by side comparison showing on-premise as stacked hardware boxes in a data center versus CCaaS as the same functional components delivered through a cloud subscription.
svg.text: Provisioned via subscription; configured and scaled on demand

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What is a PBX and what does it do?')
sendPrompt('What is an ACD server in an on-premise contact center?')
sendPrompt('What is an IVR server in an on-premise contact center?')
sendPrompt('How does call recording work on-premise?')
sendPrompt('How does routing work in a CCaaS platform?')
sendPrompt('How does IVR work in a CCaaS platform?')
sendPrompt('How does recording and analytics work in CCaaS?')
sendPrompt('How do CCaaS platforms handle CRM and other integrations?')
sendPrompt('How does agent licensing work in CCaaS?')
